summary: Peru uses 8-digit tariff codes based on the Harmonized System (HS). 6-digit HS base plus 2 Peruvian-specific additional digits.

sources.name: Peru Tariff Schedule - World Bank WITS
sources.description: World Bank's tariff database with Peruvian schedules

next_steps: Access World Bank WITS for complete Peruvian tariff schedules
Visit ADUANET official portal for official Peruvian tariff information
Download from WTO TTD for reference
notes: Peru tariff data is publicly available through World Bank WITS and WTO systems. ADUANET is the official Peruvian customs system. Data accessible through both official and international trade databases.
